reviews.review_description:
The game is truly enjoyable. The physics are well-done and realistic enough to play without feeling frustrated. It takes a bit of practice to get the hang of "shooting" with your hands, but once it clicks, time seems to fly by. 
Playing with others elevates the experience even more - joking around, laughing, chatting, playing football, and sharing moments. While it could use a bit more content and customization options, I understand it’s still a demo. All in all, it’s an excellent experience.
Just played with a few friends, although the game has a comic theme it has amazing physics! A bit more content and a single player campaign and this could be an awesome full game.
